info.name: Chettinad Thari API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Chettinad Thari POS & Inventory Management.

## Getting Started
1. Import the **Chettinad Thari — Local** environment.
2. Run **Auth → Sign In** (auto-saves `token`, `refreshToken`, `userId`).
3. Use other folders — all protected routes use `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.

## Folder Structure
- **Auth** — Login, refresh, logout, session
- **Users / Roles / Permissions / Sidebar** — Access control
- **Dashboard** — Summary widgets & charts
- **Reports / GST Reports** — Admin & tax reports
- **Categories / Masters / GST** — Master data
- **Products / Vendors** — Inventory & procurement
- **POS App / POS Billing** — Point of sale
- **Settings** — Receipt templates

Base URL: `{{baseUrl}}`

item.name: Auth

request.description: Login with username & password. Saves token automatically.
Refresh expired access token using refresh token.
Revoke refresh token and log out.
Get current user, permissions, and sidebar menu.

item.description: Run **Sign In** first. Token is saved to collection variable `token`.

request.description: Paginated user list. Use `?id=` for single user.
Billing staff + admin users (no permission check).

item.name: Roles
item.description: Role management with permission assignment. Permission: `roles:*`.

request.description: Sales totals, low stock count, vendor pending, top sellers.

item.name: Products

request.description: Select .xlsx file in Body → form-data → key `file`.

item.description: Product & inventory management. Set `productId` after Create Product.

item.name: Vendors
item.description: Vendor, orders & payments. Set `vendorId` after Create Vendor.

item.name: POS App
item.description: New POS app API. Responses use `{ success, data, error }` format.
